title: Words for Wednesday: Dare
excerpt: Happy Wednesday! Today’s wonderful quote is one from the dreamer himself, Walt Disney. “First, Think. Second, Believe. Third, Dream. & Finally, Dare.”
content:
Happy Wednesday! Today’s wonderful quote is one from the dreamer himself, Walt Disney.

“First, Think.

Second, Believe.

Third, Dream.

& Finally, Dare.”

Today I am spending the day with my dear friend and her babes at the Philly Zoo- yay! The zoo is where my Husband and I first met (okay, we met on the journey to the zoo but didn’t actually speak until we were there!) and I haven’t been back in years so I’m excited to go. It will also be fun to go with a little kid who will find wonder in it! I hope whatever your day holds, you remember Disney’s words!

Share your Words for Wednesday below!
